title: build command block
description: This mod allows crafting of command blocks.
body:
This mod allows you to make a Command block

Currently the mod has 3 different mines, tools (Stick, Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe) and a crafting table.

In the future you will be able to place the command block on the ground, I couldn't do that right now :D
